what_it_does: Defines an inline SVG icon showing three horizontally aligned circular dots using currentColor for theming.
observations: The SVG uses a 24 by 24 viewBox.
Three circle elements are positioned at x coordinates 6, 12, and 18 with a shared y coordinate of 12.
Each circle has radius 1.4 and fill set to currentColor.
The root SVG sets fill to none and stroke styling attributes using currentColor, rounded caps, and rounded joins.
standouts: The icon depicts a horizontal ellipsis pattern with explicit circle geometry.
conventions: Uses currentColor so the icon can follow surrounding text or CSS color.
Keeps geometry inline rather than referencing external symbols.
concerns: The root stroke attributes are inherited by the circles while the circles also set fill to currentColor, so dot appearance depends on both radius and stroke width.
notes: A small themable SVG asset for a horizontal three-dot overflow or more-options icon.
questions: Was the inherited stroke on the filled circles intentional, or should the dots be fill-only?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename indicates a horizontal dots icon, and the SVG renders three horizontally aligned dots.
intention_signals: It seems intended to provide a reusable, color-adaptive horizontal ellipsis icon for interface controls.
contribution: Contributes a compact, themeable horizontal dots icon defined directly with SVG circle primitives.
summary_for_embedding: This is a 24x24 inline SVG asset rendering three horizontally aligned currentColor circular dots.
intention_for_embedding: This was for representing a horizontal overflow or more-options icon in a reusable design-system asset.
